'''鈭歜-w-n''' ('''kabawan''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:machicolate|machicolate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-w-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:machicolate|machicolate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歜-w-n
|-
! Lemma
| kabawan
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibawan|thibawan]] || [[word:jibawan|jibawan]] || [[word:shibawan|shibawan]] || [[word:kibawan|kibawan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubawan|thuthubawan]] || [[word:jujubawan|jujubawan]] || [[word:shushubawan|shushubawan]] || [[word:kukubawan|kukubawan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubawan|thubawan]] || [[word:jubawan|jubawan]] || [[word:shubawan|shubawan]] || [[word:kubawan|kubawan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubawan|thubawan]] || [[word:jubawan|jubawan]] || [[word:shubawan|shubawan]] || [[word:kubawan|kubawan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebawan|thebawan]] || [[word:jebawan|jebawan]] || [[word:shebawan|shebawan]] || [[word:kebawan|kebawan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobawan|thothobawan]] || [[word:jojobawan|jojobawan]] || [[word:shoshobawan|shoshobawan]] || [[word:kokobawan|kokobawan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobawan|thobawan]] || [[word:jobawan|jobawan]] || [[word:shobawan|shobawan]] || [[word:kobawan|kobawan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobawan|thobawan]] || [[word:jobawan|jobawan]] || [[word:shobawan|shobawan]] || [[word:kobawan|kobawan]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:bawan|bawan]] || [[word:bawan|bawan]] || [[word:bawan|bawan]] || [[word:bawan|bawan]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:bawan|bawan]] || [[word:bawan|bawan]] || [[word:bawan|bawan]] || [[word:bawan|bawan]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:bawan|bawan]] || [[word:bawan|bawan]] || [[word:bawan|bawan]] || [[word:bawan|bawan]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:bawan|bawan]] || [[word:bawan|bawan]] || [[word:bawan|bawan]] || [[word:bawan|bawan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙bawan|th忙bawan]] || [[word:j忙bawan|j忙bawan]] || [[word:sh忙bawan|sh忙bawan]] || [[word:k忙bawan|k忙bawan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabawan|thathabawan]] || [[word:jajabawan|jajabawan]] || [[word:shashabawan|shashabawan]] || [[word:kakabawan|kakabawan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabawan|thabawan]] || [[word:jabawan|jabawan]] || [[word:shabawan|shabawan]] || [[word:kabawan|kabawan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabawan|thabawan]] || [[word:jabawan|jabawan]] || [[word:shabawan|shabawan]] || [[word:kabawan|kabawan]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shabawan|shabawan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshabawan|goshabawan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishabawan|gokishabawan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shabawann眉|shabawann眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshabawannkn眉|goshabawannkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishabawann眉|gokishabawann眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shabawansh毛|shabawansh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshabawannksh毛|goshabawannksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishabawansh毛|gokishabawansh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabawanro|shabawanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabawannkro|goshabawannkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabawanro|gokishabawanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shabawanmu|shabawanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabawannkmu|goshabawannkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabawanmu|gokishabawanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shabawansher|shabawansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshabawannksher|goshabawannksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishabawansher|gokishabawansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shabawanng|shabawanng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshabawannkng|goshabawannkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishabawanng|gokishabawanng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shabawanya|shabawanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshabawannkya|goshabawannkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishabawanya|gokishabawanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shabawanyam|shabawanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshabawannkyam|goshabawannkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishabawanyam|gokishabawanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabawann眉sh毛|shabawann眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabawannkn眉sh毛|goshabawannkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabawann眉sh毛|gokishabawann眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabawann眉ro|shabawann眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabawannkn眉ro|goshabawannkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabawann眉ro|gokishabawann眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabawann眉mu|shabawann眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabawannkn眉mu|goshabawannkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabawann眉mu|gokishabawann眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabawansh毛n眉|shabawansh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabawannksh毛n眉|goshabawannksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabawansh毛n眉|gokishabawansh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabawansh毛ro|shabawansh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabawannksh毛ro|goshabawannksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabawansh毛ro|gokishabawansh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabawansh毛mu|shabawansh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabawannksh毛mu|goshabawannksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabawansh毛mu|gokishabawansh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabawanron眉|shabawanron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabawannkron眉|goshabawannkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabawanron眉|gokishabawanron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabawanrosh毛|shabawanrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabawannkrosh毛|goshabawannkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabawanrosh毛|gokishabawanrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabawanromu|shabawanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabawannkromu|goshabawannkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabawanromu|gokishabawanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabawanmun眉|shabawanmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabawannkmun眉|goshabawannkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabawanmun眉|gokishabawanmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabawanmush毛|shabawanmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabawannkmush毛|goshabawannkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabawanmush毛|gokishabawanmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabawanmuro|shabawanmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabawannkmuro|goshabawannkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabawanmuro|gokishabawanmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
